subject: RE: Spotlights Bug - Found & Fixed the Issue
body:
Fulton,

Thanks for the detailed backend analysis! I found the bug on the frontend side.

## ROOT CAUSE FOUND

The **RegionalAdmin** role path was missing spotlights/features entirely!

```javascript
// useEvents.js - BOTH createEvent and updateEvent had this:
if (selectedRole === 'RegionalAdmin') {
  preparedData = {
    title, startDate, endDate, ...
    // ❌ NO features/spotlights here!
  };
} else {
  // RO, SA, SO path - HAD spotlights ✅
}
```

## ANSWERS TO YOUR QUESTIONS

1. **Field name in PUT**: Frontend sends BOTH `features` AND `spotlights` (same data)
2. **The bug**: RA path didn't include either field
3. **Why recurring worked**: Recurring uses `patch` object which was built correctly in EditOccurrenceModal

## FIX DEPLOYED

Added to both RA blocks in useEvents.js:
```javascript
features: cleanedEventData.features || cleanedEventData.spotlights || [],
spotlights: cleanedEventData.spotlights || cleanedEventData.features || [],
```

**v1.20.24** now on TEST with the fix.

## AFFECTED ROLES

| Role | Before | After |
|------|--------|-------|
| RO | ✅ | ✅ |
| RA | ❌ MISSING | ✅ Fixed |
| SA | ✅ | ✅ |
| SO | ✅ | ✅ |

Thanks for the CORS fix too - TEST is unblocked!

- Sarah
